channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: ‘SNL’: Watch Gorillaz Perform ‘Clint Eastwood,’ ‘The Moon Cave’
item.description: 🚀 Gorillaz rockin' out on SNL with 'Clint Eastwood' and 'The Moon Cave'! 🌕🎶 #Gorillaz #SNL #LiveMusic

item.title: Harry Styles Makes Surprise Cameo During Ryan Gosling’s ‘SNL’ Monologue
item.description: Guess who crashed the party? 🌟 Harry Styles surprised fans with a cameo on SNL! 🎤 #HarryStyles #SNLantics

item.title: Pitbull Plans to Replace Childhood Home With Mr. 305 Headquarters
item.description: 🎉 Mr. Worldwide is upgrading! Pitbull's childhood home is making way for the ultimate 305 headquarters! 🌴🎶 #Dale

item.title: Michael Stipe Sings R.E.M.’s “These Days” & “The Great Beyond” For The First Time In 18 Years
item.description: 🌟✨ Michael Stipe treats fans to a nostalgic surprise with a special performance of R.E.M. classics after 18 years! 🎵🎤 #MusicLegends

item.title: Watch Sudan Archives Cover Sade For XMU
item.description: 🎻 Sudan Archives puts her unique spin on a Sade classic for XMU! Let's vibe to this soulful cover together! 🔥 #MusicNews #SadeCover
